dashboard.title: Dashboard: Wolfpack Bundles
dashboard.subtitle: Access your bundles, Customer support and more.

support.heroDesc: Our experts will help you create high-converting bundles in a free, 1-on-1 strategy session.
support.heading: Need help? Speak to Parth, the Founder!
support.body: Get support with bundle setup, custom styling, and technical issues.

supportIssues.title: Stuck Somewhere?
supportIssues.storeDesignHelp: Want to get things designed as per your store?
supportIssues.description: Allow us to fix all your issues.

emptyState.title: No bundles yet
emptyState.body: You haven't created any bundles for your store. Start now and boost your sales by grouping your best products.

dashboard.noResults: No bundles match the current filters

actions.confirmClone: Are you sure you want to clone this bundle?
actions.themeEditorUnavailable: Theme editor link is unavailable for this store.

deleteModal.heading: Delete Bundle?
deleteModal.body: This action cannot be undone. All bundle configuration, steps, and discount rules will be permanently deleted.

preview.heading: Live preview
preview.emptyBody: A storefront-ready bundle is required before visual settings can be edited.

surface.description: Choose products to build your bundle.

stepFlow.title: Step Flow
stepFlow.description: Steps will render as navigation items on top of the bundle builder

category.title: Category
category.description: Categories will appear as tabs inside each step

rulesConfiguration.title: Rules guide shopper selections
rulesConfiguration.description: Use step rules for one selection limit, or category rules when each category needs its own rule.

bundleQuantityOptions.title: Bundle Quantity Options
bundleQuantityOptions.description: Show quantity-based discount rules as selectable bundle boxes. Each box can have its own label, subtext, and default rule.

discountProgressBar.title: Progress Bar
discountProgressBar.description: Show shoppers how close they are to the next discount. Simple uses one bar, while Step Based shows discount milestones.

discountMessaging.title: Discount Messaging
discountMessaging.description: Customize the messages shown before a discount unlocks and after shoppers qualify.

loadingAnimation.title: Storefront Loading Animation
loadingAnimation.description: Shown while Wolfpack Bundles loads bundle content on the storefront.

bundleVisibilityPending.description: Tracks whether your bundle is discoverable by shoppers. Optimises when you copy your bundle link and place it on your store, enable the Bundle Widget, or set up the Bundle Embed.

productSlots.title: Product Slots
productSlots.description: Display empty slots on the storefront and use the configured Slot Icon for those empty slots.

variantSelector.title: Variant Selector
variantSelector.description: Show a variant dropdown on each product card so shoppers can pick options without opening quick look.

showTextOnAddButton.title: Show Text on + Button
showTextOnAddButton.description: Replace the + icon with a text Add to Cart button placed below the product price.

cartLineItemDiscountDisplay.title: Cart Line Item Discount Display
cartLineItemDiscountDisplay.description: Control how bundle savings appear on the cart line item, including retail price and You Save messaging.

appEmbed.body: Enable the Theme app extension for Wolfpack Bundles to place and preview the bundle.
appEmbed.guideImageAlt: How to enable the Wolfpack Bundles app embed

previewGate.title: Your bundle visibility is not set up yet
previewGate.body: Your bundle is live but shoppers have no way to find it. Set up visibility to change that.

unlistedBundle.title: Your bundle is Unlisted
unlistedBundle.body: Bundle is hidden from your store's search results and collection pages. For discoverability, change the bundle product's status to Active in Shopify Products.

proxyHealth.title: App proxy not connected
proxyHealth.body: Full-page bundle widgets won't load on your storefront. Reinstall the app to fix this.

upgradePrompt.limitReachedBody: You've used all {{limit}} bundles on the Free plan. Upgrade to Grow for up to 20 bundles.
upgradePrompt.approachingBody: You're using {{current}} of {{limit}} bundles. Upgrade to Grow for up to 20 bundles.
upgradePrompt.usageBody: You're using {{current}} of {{limit}} bundles on the Free plan. Need more? Upgrade to Grow for 20 bundles.

discardChanges.title: Discard all unsaved changes
discardChanges.body: If you discard changes, you'll delete any edits you made since you last saved.

multiLanguage.title: Customize Text for Multiple Languages
multiLanguage.helper: Use the dropdown in this section to specify which language you would like to edit
multiLanguage.inputHelper: Input Text for the Selected Language

readiness.ready: Your bundle is ready to sell!
readiness.notReady: Your bundle isn't ready to sell yet.
readiness.title: Readiness Score
readiness.helper: Complete all steps to maximise your bundle's success.

createBundle.title: Create Bundle
createBundle.heading: Select bundle builder type
createBundle.help: How do bundle builder types work?

validation.minLength: Bundle name must be at least 3 characters

productPage.title: Product page bundle builder
productPage.description: Display bundle builder on existing product pages (recommended for most stores)

fullPage.title: Full page bundle builder
fullPage.description: Create a dedicated landing page for your bundle with tabs and full customization

error.heading: Subscription Issue
error.missingChargeId: Subscription confirmation failed: Missing charge ID.
error.confirmationFailed: Failed to confirm subscription with Shopify.
error.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred during subscription setup.

upgradeModal.heading: Upgrade to Grow Plan
upgradeModal.redirect: You'll be redirected to Shopify to complete your subscription.

benefits.noRevenueCap: No bundle revenue cap - free plan is limited to $500/mo

success.heading: Welcome to the Grow Plan!
success.body: Your subscription has been activated. You now have access to all premium features.

cards.freeDescription: For bundle sales up to $500/month - free until you grow
cards.growDescription: For bundle sales above $500/month - no revenue cap

cta.heading: Ready to grow your bundle business?
cta.body: Upgrade to the Grow plan for double the bundles, full design customization, and priority support.

route.title: Subscription & Billing
route.limitUpgrade: Upgrade to Grow for more bundles.
route.downgradeBody: You will be downgraded to the Free plan with a limit of {{limit}} bundles.
route.archiveWarning: Warning: You have {{current}} bundles. The excess {{excess}} bundles will be archived (not deleted).
route.helpBody: Have questions about billing or need a custom plan? Our team is here to help.
